creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
The usb(4) man page states that more information about ugen can be
	found in man page ugen(4) but there is none:

SEE ALSO
     The USB specifications can be found at
     http://www.usb.org/developers/docs.htm.
     pci(4), ohci(4), ugen(4), uhci(4), uhid(4), ukbd(4), ulpt(4), ums(4),
     usbd(8), usbdevs(8)

Fix: 

Supply the man page ugen(4).
How-To-Repeat: 
	Execute "man usb".
